test.name: Process Loan File Zip And Upload

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Process Loan File And Upload Report
Process All Loan Rows And Save Output
Read Loan Data
kw.doc: Read loan data from Excel and return rows for Robot Framework.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: TP Code ${tp_code} returned No Data Available under ${bank_name}
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.arg: Reason=TP Code not found in any bank
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.arg: Reason=Person not found in TP result table
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Set List Value
kw.doc: Sets the value of ``list`` specified by ``index`` to the given ``value``.

kw.name: Save Loan Output
kw.doc: Save processed loan rows to a new Excel file.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

errors.msg: This is a deprecated import that will be removed in favor of Autosphere.Browser.Selenium
